$description: CivUI density scales — spacious (relaxed), default (standard), dense (tight)

spacious.$description: Extra-generous density for accessibility-focused or large-screen layouts.

default.$description: Standard density — relaxed spacing for comfortable reading. Body fluid 17–19 px (mobile 17, desktop 19). Step ratio 1.125 (major-second, USWDS-aligned) on mobile blending to 1.2 (minor-third) on desktop — gentler than the previous 1.2 → 1.333 (perfect-fourth at the top) which produced 107px display headings at 1440px. Retuned 2026-05-26.

dense.$description: Tight density with reduced spacing for information-heavy layouts.
